name: Hierarchy-Aware and Anatomy-Guided Learning for Lung Ultrasound Video Classification

description: arXiv:2607.17551v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Lung ultrasound (LUS) is a bedside tool for assessing pulmonary edema in patients at risk due to heart failure or impaired kidney function. However, automated LUS analysis remains challenging because of speckle noise, imaging artifacts, and operator-dependent acquisition variability. In this work, we present a deep learning framework for multi-c...
author: Alya Almsouti, Lotfi Mecharbat, Noha Aboukhater, Yousef Alabrach, Siddiq Anwar, Andre Kumar, Ibrahim Almakky, Mohammad Yaqub
